title: Locked sentence with a final-word roulette payoff
description: Hero headline whose last word ticks through candidates on a masked wheel, then snaps onto the payoff word with an accent underline and glow.

params.name: lead
params.description: The locked sentence prefix the wheel completes (no trailing space).

params.name: word1
params.description: First candidate tick (weakest of the set).

params.name: word3
params.description: Third candidate tick (closest rival to the payoff).

params.name: payoff
params.description: The word that stays — the shot's thesis.

params.name: accent
params.description: Brand token for the wheel words, underline, and glow.

params.name: settleSec
params.description: Seconds after scene start when the payoff locks (leave >=1s of scene after it, and keep it at least 1s before the scene ends).
